pages.name: page-blank.html
pages.editableElements:
main:htmlBlocks(styling:[
  { selector: 'section, div, h1, h2, h3, p, button, a, span, time',
    collection: 'classes',
    categories: 'layout flexbox grid spacing typography colors-backgrounds borders effects Transforms transitions-animation  lists tables miscellaneous' },
    { selector: 'img',                 collection: 'classes', categories: 'radius effects' },
    { selector: 'root',                 collection: 'classes', categories: 'background-color' }
]),
